text:
(a) The pilot board of a navigation district is composed of the district’s navigation and canal commissioners.

(b) A member of the pilot board is a commissioner of pilots.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.021 — Pilot Board; Commissioners of Pilots

(a) The pilot board of a navigation district is composed of the district’s navigation and canal commissioners.

(b) A member of the pilot board is a commissioner of pilots.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The pilot board of a navigation district is composed of the district’s navigation and canal commissioners.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A member of the pilot board is a commissioner of pilots.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
